flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Towson University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($25.5k → $29.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Towson University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.5k → $11.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Towson University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).
